_comment: The opening — plays once on the very first join of a fresh pack world, right after the auto-install provisions it (AutoInstall dispatches cutscene play opening). SMOOTH FLOW (2026-07-23): no more built-in pauses — the old scene froze on a still HOLD (two duplicate keyframes, 90t+30t at the same spot) over the title card while install streamed chunks; that pause is removed. The FIRST segment is now a SLOW, LOCAL establishing drift (ticks:120) that stays near the spawn / Mom's house (over the chunks that load first, so it does not sweep ungenerated terrain) — the title card sits over gentle motion rather than a dead freeze — THEN the camera flows continuously through lift → drift → settle with no repeated keyframes. The camera lifts from outside Mom's house (2607.5/109/2847.5), drifts high over Sango Town, glances toward the lab hill (2674.5/128/2901.5), and settles back at the door. Corporate cold open — the game title card §eThe Cobblemon Initiative§r over a Company, Inc. internal-memo subtitle (foreshadows the villain org without naming the Founder). startTitleStay:130 (vs the 10/70/20 engine default) holds the title across the ~120t install hold so it does not fade off a still shot — showrunner 2026-07-21, 'show it a little longer'. NOTE: 'The Cobblemon Initiative' is 24 chars, right at the ~24-char clip limit for vanilla 4x titles at GUI scale 3 — kept non-bold so it fits; if it clips on a narrow window, shorten or drop GUI scale. FLAG: the 90-tick hold is a fixed guess — on a slow disk/first-gen world it may need lengthening (chunks still popping in when the camera starts moving); on a fast SSD it may feel long. Tune the hold's ticks after a real fresh-install run. TODO(showrunner): nudge keyframes to the town skyline.
